questions.question: What is the primary function of the Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU) within a CPU?
options: Storing program instructions.
Managing virtual memory translations.
Performing arithmetic and bitwise logic operations.
Controlling the flow of data between components.
Caching frequently accessed data.

questions.question: In the physical design verification flow for an Integrated Circuit (IC), what is the primary purpose of a Layout Versus Schematic (LVS) check?
options: To verify that the circuit meets its specified timing requirements.
To ensure the physical layout matches the functionality described in the schematic/netlist.
To identify power integrity issues across the chip.
To check for design rule violations (e.g., minimum spacing, width).
To estimate the power consumption of the design.

questions.question: In the context of shared-memory multi-processor systems, particularly with relaxed memory consistency models, what is the primary characteristic of an "acquire" memory operation?
options: It ensures that all subsequent memory operations on the acquiring processor are observed after the acquire completes.
It guarantees that any memory operations preceding its paired "release" operation on another processor are made visible before any memory operations following the acquire on the current processor.
It invalidates all local cache lines associated with the acquired resource.
It strictly enforces sequential consistency for all operations between the acquire and a subsequent release.
It allows prior reads to be reordered past it but prevents prior writes from being reordered past it.

questions.question: In the physical design phase of digital Integrated Circuits, what is the primary objective of Clock Tree Synthesis (CTS)?
options: To maximize the overall operating frequency of the chip by reducing critical path delays.
To ensure all sequential elements receive the clock signal simultaneously or with minimal clock skew, and within acceptable latency.
To reduce the overall power consumption by selectively turning off clock signals to idle blocks.
To optimize the routing of data signals between different functional blocks, reducing interconnect delay.
To generate the gate-level netlist from an RTL description, converting high-level logic into gates.

questions.question: Which semiconductor manufacturing process involves using light to transfer a geometric pattern from a photomask to a light-sensitive chemical photoresist on the wafer surface, initiating the patterning of IC features?
options: Chemical Vapor Deposition (CVD)
Atomic Layer Deposition (ALD)
Etching
Lithography
Ion Implantation
